name: DataSunrise Database Security
description: Integrates with DataSunrise Database Security Suite REST API for database activity monitoring, dynamic data masking, firewall rule management, and compliance auditing

actions.name: List Audit Rules
actions.description: Retrieve all configured database audit rules for monitoring specific query types, sensitive data access, and user activity

parameters.name: databaseId
parameters.description: Filter rules by specific database instance ID

actions.name: List Audit Events
actions.description: Retrieve database audit events captured by configured audit rules

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Start date for audit event query (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: End date for audit event query (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: ruleId
parameters.description: Filter events by specific audit rule ID

parameters.name: databaseId
parameters.description: Filter events by database instance ID

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of events to return

actions.name: List Databases
actions.description: Retrieve all monitored database instances registered with DataSunrise

parameters.name: dbType
parameters.description: Filter by database type (MySQL, PostgreSQL, Oracle, SQL Server, etc.)

actions.name: List Security Rules
actions.description: Retrieve all database firewall security rules configured for SQL injection prevention and access control

parameters.name: databaseId
parameters.description: Filter rules by database instance ID

actions.name: List Masking Rules
actions.description: Retrieve all dynamic data masking rules for obfuscating sensitive data

parameters.name: databaseId
parameters.description: Filter masking rules by database instance ID

actions.name: Search Activity
actions.description: Search through database activity logs for specific queries, users, or data access patterns

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search query string for activity log filtering
